Class ApiErrorLogTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.jAdmin.model.ApiErrorLogTBL
@Entity public class ApiErrorLogTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing system error logs in the database.

This class maps to the system_error_logs table and stores information about errors that occur in the application, including the class where the error occurred, error message, error type, and associated user.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • userloginid - ID of the user who experienced the error
  • classname - Class where the error occurred
  • errortype - Type/category of error
  • ErrorMessage - Detailed error message
  • auxdata - Additional data (e.g., stack trace) stored as JSON
